meaning: adj.圆胖的,丰满的,鼓起的vt.突然放下,使丰满,使鼓起vi.变丰满,鼓起adv.使发胖(或鼓起)的东西,鼓鳃物,沉重(或突然)坠落,沉重地,突然地,坦白地n.扑通声
examples: He pushed a plump little hand toward me.
Maria was a pretty little thing, small and plump with a mass of curly hair.
How plump, how beautiful she is!
Presence and confidence are now as important as good skin, long eyelashes and plump cheeks.
Both men looked like retired businessmen: they were plump, sporting neat ties and formal shirts.
